name: 🎤 Underground
description: DIY venues, gigs and attendees from the underground scene. Three bronze sources joined into a silver fact, aggregated to gold, with append-only history, rich documentation and a scheduled refresh.

pipelines.name: venues
pipelines.description: 50 DIY venues — capacity, type, opening year. full_refresh strategy.

table_metadata.description: Underground venues catalogue. Stable reference data, refreshed in full each run.

column_descriptions.venue_name: Human name of the venue, e.g. 'Squat de la Lune #3'.
column_descriptions.city: European city where the venue lives.
column_descriptions.capacity: Maximum attendance the space can hold.
column_descriptions.opened_year: Year the venue first hosted gigs.

pipelines.name: gigs
pipelines.description: 500 gigs across the venues — APPEND_ONLY (each gig is an immutable event).

table_metadata.description: Gig history. Append-only: every run extends the schedule with new events; nothing is rewritten.

column_descriptions.sold_out: Whether the gig sold out (~28% of the demo's gigs do).

pipelines.name: attendees
pipelines.description: 5000 attendance records — who came to which gig and whether they paid.

column_descriptions.paid: Whether they paid at the door (75% paid in the demo data).
column_descriptions.price_eur: What they paid (0 for free entries / guest list).

pipelines.name: gigs_with_venues
pipelines.description: Bronze gigs left-joined to bronze venues — uses ref() to read both upstreams.

pipelines.name: attendance_per_gig
pipelines.description: Per-gig aggregate of attendance + paid count + revenue.

pipelines.name: attendance_by_venue
pipelines.description: Per-venue lifetime attendance and revenue — the scene heatmap. Scheduled every 6 hours.

pipelines.name: most_active_artists
pipelines.description: Artists ranked by total gigs and attendance pulled.

quality_tests.name: gigs_have_venue
quality_tests.description: Every gig must reference a venue_id.

quality_tests.name: attendance_non_negative
quality_tests.description: Attendance counts can never be negative.
